Bash(PGPASSWORD=JMD333 "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/17/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d postgres -c "
SELECT 'inventory.products' as tbl, count\(*\) FROM inventory.products
UNION ALL SELECT 'inventory.warehouses', count\(*\) FROM inventory.warehouses
UNION ALL SELECT 'inventory.inventory_levels', count\(*\) FROM inventory.inventory_levels
UNION ALL SELECT 'inventory.stock_movements', count\(*\) FROM inventory.stock_movements
UNION ALL SELECT 'inventory.product_pricing', count\(*\) FROM inventory.product_pricing
UNION ALL SELECT 'inventory.price_history', count\(*\) FROM inventory.price_history
UNION ALL SELECT 'hr.employees', count\(*\) FROM hr.employees
UNION ALL SELECT 'hr.employee_skills', count\(*\) FROM hr.employee_skills
UNION ALL SELECT 'hr.performance_reviews', count\(*\) FROM hr.performance_reviews
UNION ALL SELECT 'hr.leave_records', count\(*\) FROM hr.leave_records
UNION ALL SELECT 'finance.offices', count\(*\) FROM finance.offices
UNION ALL SELECT 'finance.sales_transactions', count\(*\) FROM finance.sales_transactions
UNION ALL SELECT 'finance.mv_daily_office_profit_loss', count\(*\) FROM finance.mv_daily_office_profit_loss
UNION ALL SELECT 'finance.mv_daily_product_revenue', count\(*\) FROM finance.mv_daily_product_revenue
ORDER BY 1;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JMD333 "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/17/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d postgres -c "SELECT DISTINCT category FROM inventory.products ORDER BY category" 2>&1)
Bash(PGPASSWORD=JMD333 "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/17/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d postgres -c "SELECT DISTINCT department FROM hr.employees ORDER BY department" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JMD333 "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/17/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d postgres -c "
SELECT category, subcategory, count\(*\) as cnt, 
       min\(product_name\) as example_product
FROM inventory.products 
GROUP BY category, subcategory 
ORDER BY category, subcategory;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JMD333 "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/17/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d postgres -c "
SELECT w.warehouse_name, w.city, w.warehouse_type, w.capacity_square_feet,
       count\(il.product_id\) as products_stocked,
       sum\(il.current_quantity\) as total_stock,
       sum\(case when il.current_quantity < il.safety_stock_quantity then 1 else 0 end\) as below_safety
FROM inventory.warehouses w
LEFT JOIN inventory.inventory_levels il ON w.warehouse_id = il.warehouse_id
GROUP BY w.warehouse_id, w.warehouse_name, w.city, w.warehouse_type, w.capacity_square_feet
ORDER BY w.city;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JMD333 "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/17/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d postgres -c "
SELECT movement_type, count\(*\) as cnt, 
       sum\(quantity\) as total_qty,
       min\(moved_at::date\) as earliest,
       max\(moved_at::date\) as latest
FROM inventory.stock_movements 
GROUP BY movement_type 
ORDER BY cnt DESC;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JMD333 "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/17/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d postgres -c "
SELECT p.category, 
       round\(avg\(pp.margin_percentage\),1\) as avg_margin,
       round\(avg\(pp.cost_price_per_unit\),0\) as avg_cost,
       round\(avg\(pp.current_selling_price_per_unit\),0\) as avg_sell,
       round\(avg\(pp.competitor_average_price\),0\) as avg_competitor,
       round\(avg\(pp.demand_elasticity_coefficient\),2\) as avg_elasticity
FROM inventory.product_pricing pp
JOIN inventory.products p ON p.product_id = pp.product_id
GROUP BY p.category 
ORDER BY avg_margin DESC;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JMD333 "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/17/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d postgres -c "
SELECT department, count\(*\) as headcount,
       round\(avg\(base_salary_amount\),0\) as avg_salary,
       round\(min\(base_salary_amount\),0\) as min_salary,
       round\(max\(base_salary_amount\),0\) as max_salary,
       count\(distinct designation\) as designations,
       count\(distinct office_location\) as locations
FROM hr.employees 
GROUP BY department 
ORDER BY headcount DESC;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JMD333 "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/17/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d postgres -c "
SELECT DISTINCT designation FROM hr.employees ORDER BY designation;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JMD333 "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/17/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d postgres -c "
SELECT skill_category, count\(distinct skill_name\) as unique_skills, count\(*\) as total_assignments
FROM hr.employee_skills 
GROUP BY skill_category 
ORDER BY total_assignments DESC;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JMD333 "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/17/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d postgres -c "
SELECT skill_name, count\(*\) as employees_with_skill
FROM hr.employee_skills 
GROUP BY skill_name 
ORDER BY employees_with_skill DESC 
LIMIT 15;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JMD333 "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/17/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d postgres -c "
SELECT round\(avg\(rating_score\),2\) as avg_rating,
       min\(rating_score\) as min_rating,
       max\(rating_score\) as max_rating,
       count\(*\) as total_reviews,
       count\(distinct review_period\) as periods
FROM hr.performance_reviews;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JMD333 "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/17/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d postgres -c "
SELECT DISTINCT review_period FROM hr.performance_reviews ORDER BY review_period;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JMD333 "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/17/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d postgres -c "
SELECT leave_type, approval_status, count\(*\) as cnt
FROM hr.leave_records 
GROUP BY leave_type, approval_status 
ORDER BY leave_type, approval_status;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JMD333 "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/17/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d postgres -c "
SELECT o.office_name, o.city, o.office_type,
       round\(o.one_time_capital_invested/100000,1\) as capital_lakhs,
       round\(o.monthly_operating_expense/100000,1\) as monthly_opex_lakhs,
       round\(o.net_working_capital/100000,1\) as nwc_lakhs
FROM finance.offices o
ORDER BY o.one_time_capital_invested DESC;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JMD333 "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/17/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d postgres -c "
SELECT min\(transaction_date\) as earliest, max\(transaction_date\) as latest,
       count\(*\) as total_txns,
       round\(sum\(total_selling_amount\)/10000000,2\) as total_revenue_cr,
       round\(sum\(profit_amount\)/10000000,2\) as total_profit_cr,
       round\(avg\(profit_amount/NULLIF\(total_selling_amount - discount_amount,0\)\)*100, 1\) as avg_margin_pct,
       count\(distinct product_id\) as products_sold,
       count\(distinct office_id\) as offices,
       DISTINCT count\(case when is_sale_day then 1 end\) as sale_day_txns
FROM finance.sales_transactions;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JMD333 "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/17/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d postgres -c "
SELECT min\(transaction_date\) as earliest, max\(transaction_date\) as latest,
       count\(*\) as total_txns,
       round\(sum\(total_selling_amount\)/10000000,2\) as total_revenue_cr,
       round\(sum\(profit_amount\)/10000000,2\) as total_profit_cr,
       count\(distinct product_id\) as products_sold,
       count\(distinct office_id\) as offices,
       sum\(case when is_sale_day then 1 else 0 end\) as sale_day_txns
FROM finance.sales_transactions;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JMD333 "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/17/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d postgres -c "
SELECT office_name, city,
       round\(sum\(gross_revenue\)/100000,1\) as revenue_lakhs,
       round\(sum\(gross_profit\)/100000,1\) as profit_lakhs,
       round\(avg\(gross_margin_percentage\),1\) as avg_margin,
       sum\(total_transaction_count\) as txns,
       min\(date\) as from_date, max\(date\) as to_date
FROM finance.mv_daily_office_profit_loss
GROUP BY office_name, city
ORDER BY revenue_lakhs DESC;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JMD333 "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/17/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d postgres -c "
SELECT product_name, product_category,
       round\(sum\(total_profit_amount\)/100000,1\) as profit_lakhs,
       round\(avg\(profit_margin_percentage\),1\) as avg_margin,
       sum\(total_units_sold\) as units
FROM finance.mv_daily_product_revenue
GROUP BY product_name, product_category
ORDER BY profit_lakhs DESC
LIMIT 10;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JMD333 "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/17/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d postgres -c "
SELECT 
  sum\(units_sold_on_sale_days\) as sale_day_units,
  sum\(units_sold_on_normal_days\) as normal_day_units,
  round\(sum\(profit_on_sale_days\)/100000,1\) as sale_profit_lakhs,
  round\(sum\(profit_on_normal_days\)/100000,1\) as normal_profit_lakhs
FROM finance.mv_daily_product_revenue;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JMD333 "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/17/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d postgres -c "
-- Products below safety stock with details
SELECT p.product_name, p.category, w.city, 
       il.current_quantity, il.safety_stock_quantity,
       il.reorder_point_quantity
FROM inventory.inventory_levels il
JOIN inventory.products p ON p.product_id = il.product_id
JOIN inventory.warehouses w ON w.warehouse_id = il.warehouse_id
WHERE il.current_quantity < il.safety_stock_quantity
ORDER BY \(il.safety_stock_quantity - il.current_quantity\) DESC
LIMIT 10;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JMD333 "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/17/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d postgres -c "
SELECT e.full_name, e.department, e.designation, e.office_location,
       pr.review_period, pr.rating_score, 
       left\(pr.review_text, 120\) as review_snippet
FROM hr.performance_reviews pr
JOIN hr.employees e ON e.employee_id = pr.employee_id
ORDER BY pr.rating_score DESC
LIMIT 5;" 2>&1)

Bash(pip install:*)
